# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release Pipeline

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build and Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Build application
      run: npm run build

    - name: Create Release
      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
      with:
        files: dist/*
        token: ${{secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN}}
        release_name: ${{ github.ref }}
        body: "Release ${{ github.ref }}"
    
    - name: Publish to npm
      run: npm publish

    - name: Publish to PyPI
      uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release
      with:
        user: __token__
        password: ${{secrets.PYPI_API_KEY}}
